• Break (When I am put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play me immediately without paying my cost.)
• Enter : Draw a card. Then discard a card.
flavor: Greed destroys the body.

name: Paper Eating Virus
ability:
• Break (When this card is put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play it immediately without paying its cost.)
• Target enemy player discards two cards.
flavor: If it seems unfair, that's only because it is.

name: Partner Change
ability: • Exchange control of target Lv1 face up caster your opponent controls that does not share a name with any card you control, and target Lv1 face up caster you control that does not share a name with any card your opponent controls.
flavor: Sometimes a different teamup is good.

name: Passion Wing
ability: • Rest: Target allied servant gains +500 ATK until end of turn.
flavor: Miss Manami, thanks for always being so kind.

name: Passion Wing
ability:
• As long as your opponent controls six or more orbs, cards they control lose Break.
• Rest: Target allied servant with cost of 2 or less gains +500 ATK until end of turn.
flavor: I'll try making a beat down deck for now.

name: Passion Wing Lv2
ability:
• Banish a "Passion Wing" from my Stock: Destroy target enemy servant with a cost of 2 or less.
• Rest: Target allied servant gains +1000 ATK until end of turn.
flavor: Miss Sakura, I'm going to get serious!

name: Passion Wing Saaya
ability:
• As long as your opponent controls six or more orbs, cards they control lose Break.
• Rest: Target allied servant with cost of 2 or less gains +500 ATK until end of turn.
flavor: I'll try making a beat down deck for now.

name: Patience Bag
ability: • [Break](When this card is put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play it immediately without paying its cost.)
flavor: Jeeze! I can't take it anymore!

name: Pentachi
ability: • Enter : Look at target enemy orb, then return it. (When this card enters the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: It glitters even in the darkness.

name: Pentachi
ability: • Enter : Look at target enemy orb, then return it. (When this card enters the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: It glitters even in the darkness.

name: Percival
ability: • Rest: Turn target face up Lv1 allied caster face down.
flavor: Let's wipe your brain into a clean slate~

name: Percival lv2
ability: • Rest, Banish a "Percival" from my Stock OR Banish a face down caster: Discard your hand. Then draw three cards.
flavor: This is a new world.

name: Phoenix
ability: • At end of turn : If I was put into a graveyard from the field this turn, put me into the field under my owner's control.
flavor: It even slacks off on dying.

name: Pillage
ability:
Quickcast (You may play this card any time you have priority.)
• Until end of turn, if target enemy player would draw a card by a card or ability, you draw a card instead.
flavor: Knowing an enemy's movements is key to a successful raid.

name: Play Nice
ability:
• Quickcast (You may play this card any time you have priority.)

• You can't be attacked this turn. Remove this card from game as it resolves.
flavor: "Could you do that for me?"

name: Pompous Delphinium
ability: • Your opponent cannot attack allied rested servants while I am reversed.
flavor: Try what you like, you won't get past it.

name: Praying to Deaf Ears
ability:
• Quickcast
• [Universal](You may pay the TERRA aether of this card with any element except non-elemental aether.)
• Remove target caster ability in the chase. If you paid {Terra} aether for this card, Draw a card.
flavor: Abandoned.

name: Price of Overeating
ability: • Draw four cards. Then discard four cards.
flavor: She lost a lot as compensation.

name: Prideful Peafowl
ability: • Enter : Target enemy player banishes a servant. (When I enter the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: There's no time to be distracted by beauty.

name: Primal Sloth
ability:
• Slow Start (I cannot attack the turn I am played to the field.)
• Whenever I destroy an enemy servant by battle : Recover me. Play this ability only once per turn.
flavor: Gentle people fear their own anger. It weighs on them.

name: Princess Papillon
ability: • Rest, discard a caster: Put target Insect in an allied graveyard into your hand.
flavor: "Dance for me once again."

name: Proclamation of Life and Death
ability:
• Break (When this card is put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play it immediately without paying its cost.)
• Target enemy player banishes a servant.
flavor: "Die."

name: Procrastination
ability: • Return ALL servants to their owners' hands.
flavor: "I'll work hard!...Tomorrow!"

name: Pumpkin Chariot
ability:
• Break (When I am put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play me immediately without paying my cost.)

At end of turn : Return me to my owner's hand if I attacked this turn.
flavor: The ultimate tank created by magical girls.

name: Puria Marito
ability: • Rest, discard a caster: Destroy target reversed enemy servant if an allied servant corrupted an enemy orb this turn.
flavor: Yae! I found a really good inkstone to use!

name: R'lyeh
ability:
• You may pay 1 less when playing [Cthulhu] with a cost of 4 or more.
• You may only have one Barrier in play while this card is on your field.
flavor: A city void of life.

name: Rafina Soa
ability: • Rest: Recover target Lv1 allied caster.
flavor: "Sayuri! Natsume! We need some new outfits for our new single!"

name: Ran Berfield
ability: • Rest: Return target [Cryptid] or [Plant] allied servant to its owner's hand. If you do, another target allied servant gains +500 ATK until end of turn.
flavor: "Miu! Show me some magic!"

name: Ran Berfield lv2
ability: • Banish a "Ran Berfield" from my Stock: Remove target servant from the game. At end of turn → Put it into the field under its owner's control.
flavor: Go forth! Daze!

name: Rich Macaron
flavor: They're good for you so eat as many as you like.

name: Rocket Pencil Hedgehog
ability: • Whenever I am targeted by an enemy card or ability : That enemy player discards a card.
flavor: Touch me and you'll get dirty!

name: Rose of Insolence
flavor: Beauty is impertinent.

name: Ruka Eremi
ability: • Rest: Target allied servant gains +100 ATK for each card in your hand until end of turn.
flavor: "I'll decide this with my fortune."

name: Ruka Eremi Lv2
ability:
• Banish a "Ruka Eremi" from my Stock: Draw a card.
• Rest: Target allied servant gains +200 ATK for each card in your hand until end of turn.
flavor: "Something money can't solve? I guess I'll solve it with magic."

name: Sage Advice
ability: • If you would draw a card, you may instead look at the top three cards of your deck. If you do, choose one from among them and put it into your hand and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavor: "Please impart your wisdom on me, oh ancient master."

name: Sage's Book
ability: • Draw a card.
flavor: If you cram an overwhelming amount of knowledge, you too can become a sage.

name: Saira Treverse
ability: • [Rest]: Draw a card if enemy servants attacked twice or more this turn.
flavor: "Can you solve my puzzle?"

name: Salamander
ability: • Enter: Destroy target rested enemy servant.(When this servant enters the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: Her anger formed into a fearsome spirit.

name: Salvation by Faith
ability: • Each player can only play one non-aether caster ability per turn.
flavor: Let's unwind a bit.

name: Servant Exchange
ability:
• Break (When I am put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play me immediately without paying my cost.)
• Exchange control of target allied servant and target enemy servant.
flavor: "Here, you can have this one."

name: Servant Seal
ability:
• Break (When this card is put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play it immediately without paying its cost.) 
• Put target servant into its owner's orb zone face down, as an orb.
flavor: The wicked shall become a shield for the righteous.

name: Shera Angellica
ability: • Rest: Draw a card if an allied servant corrupted an enemy orb this turn.
flavor: Hitori, let me copy your homework!

name: Shopping Plaza
ability: • At end of enemy turn : Draw a card.
flavor: "Let's hurry to the sale!"

name: Silver Key
ability:
• [Universal](You may pay the VOID aether of this card with any element except non-elemental aether.)
• Put target servant you own from an allied removed zone into your hand. If you paid VOID aether for this card, that servant costs 1 less the next time it is played this turn. It cannot cost less than 1.
flavor: Open the door leading to oth dimension.

name: Sneering Orchid
ability: • Break (When this card is put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play it immediately without paying its cost.)
flavor: It laughs because it knows you have no confidence.

name: Solol Baton
ability: • Rest: Target enemy player discards a card if an enemy servant was returned to a player's hand from a servant zone this turn.
flavor: Morning, Tamaki!

name: Sophmore Slump
ability: • All servants gain Slow Start. (I cannot attack the turn I am played to the field.)
flavor: Ah~ I really don't feel like fighting~.

name: Spirit Scissors
ability: • Last Words : Destroy target enemy servant with a cost of 2 or less. (When this card is put into a graveyard from the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: *Snip snip*

name: Spiteful Clam
ability: [Unity](Whenever I attack : You may rest any number of recovered allied servants that share a Trait with me. If you do, I gain +X ATK until end of turn, where X is the total ATK of servants rested this way)
flavor: Sucks up all hope.

name: Split Eagle
ability: • Last Words → Put up to two servants with a cost of two or less each from your hand into the field.
flavor: Greed destroys you, but you get a lot too. So there's some benefits.

name: Starting Anew
ability: • Discard your hand. Take an extra turn after this one. Remove this card from game as it resolves.
flavor: It'll all workout somehow!

name: Stationery Slime
ability:
• Enter : Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a [Supplies] servant with Cost 4 or less, put it into the field. Otherwise, put it into your hand.
• Last Words : Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a [Supplies] servant with Cost 4 or less, put it into the field. Otherwise, put it into your hand.
flavor: *Wobble wobble* *Boing boing*

name: Straw Effigy
ability: • [Enter]: Corrupt an allied orb. (When this card enters the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: A curse digs two graves.

name: Strawberry on the Shortcake
flavor: A simple, delicious treat.

name: Succubus
ability:
• Double Corrupt (When this servant corrupts, it corrupts two orbs instead of one.)

• Enter : Rest or Reverse target enemy servant.
flavor: Love can make one do pretty stupid things.

name: Summoning Obstruction
ability:
• Quickcast (You may play this card any time you have priority.)
• Return target servant in the chase to its owner's hand. (The servant is not played. Your opponent still pays the cost of the servant)
flavor: Return.

name: Sun Wukong
ability: • Enter : Search your deck for a [Youkai] with a cost of 1, reveal it and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck.
flavor: Magic duels sure are exciting.

name: Sunbeam Roasting
ability: • At end of enemy turn : That enemy player discards a card.
flavor: Bit by bit, the entire thing is cooked through.

name: Sunny
ability: • Rest: Draw a card if an enemy discarded a card this turn.
flavor: "Huh? Where's Rikocchi?"

name: Sunny lv2
ability:
• Banish a "Sunny" from my Stock: Target enemy player discards a card. Play this ability only during main timing.
• Rest: Put target servant with a cost of 3 or less that was discarded from an enemy hand this turn into an allied servant zone.
flavor: "I won't forgive anyone who hurts Rikocchi."

name: Sweet Pea
ability: • Rest: Target allied servant loses Slow Start until end of turn.
flavor: You sure know a lot, Karen-chan.

name: Sweets Buffet
ability: • Whenever another allied [Sweets] enters the field : Search your deck for a [Sweets], reveal it and put it into your hand. Then shuffle your deck.
flavor: The height of pleasure.

name: Tactless Butterfly
ability:
• [Hubris] (Cards with [Hubris] may attack enemy players even if there are reversed enemy servants.) 
• I cannot be attacked while rested.
flavor: Sucks up all life.

name: Tenel Frula
ability: • Rest, discard a caster: Target allied [Cosmetics] gains Double Corrupt until end of turn.
flavor: An~ Let's go to Karaoke!

name: Total Eclipse
ability:
• Break (When this card is put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play it immediately without paying its cost.)
• Destroy target servant.
flavor: All is devoured, not a scrap remains.

name: Toxic Turkey
ability: • Whenever I attack an enemy servant : Destroy that enemy servant.
flavor: An avatar of revenge for all the birds that are killed on a certain day every year.

name: Twinkle Charm
ability: • Rest: Draw a card if you drew a card by the effect of a conjure this turn.
flavor: "I want tea time with Mahiro-san~."

name: Twinkle Charm lv2
ability:
• Rest, banish a "Twinkle Charm" from my Stock: Search your deck for a servant with the same name as target allied servant with a cost of 2 or less and put it into the field. Then shuffle your deck.
• Rest: Draw a card.
flavor: Why don't you have one more?

name: Unreliable Monk
ability: • At the start of your turn : Return me to my owner's hand.
flavor: If only it wasn't so fickle...

name: Vega Scarlet Star
ability: • Rest, banish an orb: Corrupt target orb.
flavor: For Miwa-sama, I would do anything.

name: Venus Flytrap
ability: • Last Words : Return target enemy servant that attacked this card this turn to its owner's hand. (When this card is put into a graveyard from the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: A drastic strategy.

name: Wait There, Okay
ability:
• Break (When this card is put into your hand from an orb zone, you may play it immediately without paying its cost.)

• Reverse target enemy servant.
flavor: "That's a promise, okay?"

name: Wandering Flames
flavor: "Tsubasa...Tsubasa..."

name: White Fox
ability: • Enter : Destroy target barrier. (When this card enters the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: It increases the greed of those around it.

name: Wise Pencil
ability: • Enter : Look at the top card of your deck, then return it. (When this card enters the field : Perform the effect.)
flavor: Seems like short pencils gather together in some secret place.

name: Wooden Bear
ability:
• Double Corrupt (When this servant corrupts, it corrupts two orbs instead of one.)
• Enter : Return target servant to its owner's hand.
flavor: By the time you notice, it's already there.

name: World of Rage
ability:
• Enemy servants enter the field recovered.
• Enemy servants cannot be switched except by spell or ability.
flavor: Searching for those who live in blind rage.

name: Zhu Bajie
ability: • Enter : Search your deck for a Sweets with a cost of 1, reveal it and put it into your hand. Then shuffle your deck.
flavor: "Don't underestimate the power of snacks!"

name: Zoi Russel
ability: • Rest: Draw a card if an allied servant was destroyed in battle this turn.
flavor: "Runa, you're interested in this kind of thing?"
